hero.title: We transform surpluses into sustainable businesses.
hero.subtitle: Technology, management and market access to turn losses into new business opportunities.

system.title: The countryside faces major challenges
system.subtitle: Post-harvest losses, market fluctuations and sustainability pressure continue to limit rural growth. At Rural Commerce, we transform these bottlenecks into efficiency, revenue and supply chain security.
system.heading: A complete system to transform rural production

hardwarePrecision.title: Precision Hardware
hardwarePrecision.body: Modular equipment designed to optimize processes, reduce costs and add value to production.

softwareIntelligence.title: Intelligence & Management Software
softwareIntelligence.body: Tools that centralize business management and production monitoring, delivering indicators and security for decision-making.

gestionRescate.title: Waste Recovery & Valorization
gestionRescate.body: Commercial processes that transform waste into sellable products with extended shelf life, preventing disposal emissions.

metodologia.title: Acceleration Methodology
metodologia.body: Practical framework to standardize quality, structure margins and open commercial channels.

diagnostico.title: Efficiency Diagnosis
diagnostico.body: Discover where your business is losing money.

aliadosPage.title: Partners & Investors
aliadosPage.quote: We achieved a 40% reduction in post-harvest losses in accompanied projects, generating new income streams for farmers and supply chain partners.
